name: rung_360_ce_story_branch_merge_noise
utterances: Chapter-merge mode, noisy language allowed, deterministic KB required.
Set parent(aeris, bryn). Set parent(aeris, corin). Set parent(bryn, dina). Set parent(corin, elan).
assert rule ancestor(X, Y) :- parent(X, Y).
assert rule ancestor(X, Z) :- parent(X, Y), ancestor(Y, Z).
assert rule in_region(X, Z) :- at(X, Y), inside(Y, Z).
Set at(dina, west_quay). Set inside(west_quay, moon_basin). Set carries(bryn, tide_key).

utterances.utterance: she moved em to north ramp same basin
clarification_answers: She means Corin and em means Elan.

utterances: Set at(elan, north_ramp). Set inside(north_ramp, moon_basin).

utterances.utterance: actually key goes to the other kid branch not his own
clarification_answers: Key means tide_key. Give it to Corin, not Bryn.

utterances.utterance: merge those middles so aeris still reaches both leaves
clarification_answers: Merge means add parent(corin, dina) without removing existing parents.

utterances: Final query pass: query ancestor(aeris, dina). Query ancestor(aeris, elan). Query in_region(elan, moon_basin). Query carries(corin, tide_key).
